title: [BUG] "History" name is reserved for worksheets
author: jroith
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

It's unclear to me why the name "History" is reserved. I'm trying to read a file that actually contains such a sheet and looking at the exceljs source the check is only used in a unit test.

comments.author: mingpepe
comments.body: According to [this](https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/rename-a-worksheet-3f1f7148-ee83-404d-8ef0-9ff99fbad1f9), 'History' is a reserved word Excel uses internally.
